status.attention: Waa la xiray · Wuxuu u baahan yahay fiiro gaar ah

onboarding.title: Ku xir boggaaga EaseAccess24
onboarding.subtitle: Ku dhaji Furahaaga Widget (ama guud ahaan qoraalka) si aad ugu darto widget-ka dhaqdhaqaaqa boggan.
onboarding.emptyBody: Abuur ururkaaga, dooro qorshe, oo ku dar domain-kan EaseAccess24. Waxaad heli doontaa Furaha Widget oo aad halkan ku dhigi doonto.
onboarding.helper: Ku dhaji kaliya furaha (tusaale ahaan ABC123) ama guud ahaan <script> qoraalka — waxaan ka soo saari doonaa furaha.

errors.empty: Ku dhaji Furahaaga Widget ama qoraalka qoraalka marka hore.
errors.noKey: Ma heli karno Furaha Widget-kaas. Ku dhaji furaha, ama guud ahaan qoraalka qoraalka oo ay ku jiraan.
errors.network: Ma aanaan awoodin inaan keydinnno furahaaga. Hubi isku xirkaaga oo mar kale isku day.

dashboard.title: Xiriirka
dashboard.subtitle: Furahaaga Widget waa la keydiyay. Orod Baaritaanka Caafimaadka si aad u xaqiijiso in widget-ka uu shaqeynayo oo uu muuqdo boggaaga.
dashboard.healthNotRunYet: Ma jirto baaritaan la orday weli

health.heading: Baaritaanka Caafimaadka
health.intro: Tani waxay ka shaqaysaa biraawsarkaaga: waxay keentaa boggaaga waxayna hubisaa in widget-ka uu dhab ahaantii soo baxo. Waxba lama dirin EaseAccess24.
health.advisoriesHeading: Sidoo kale waxaa mudan in la hubiyo
health.timeoutBody: Baaritaanku ma dhamin wakhtigii. Tani waxay dhici kartaa haddii boggu si tartiib tartiib ah u soo baxay ama ay xannibtay goobaha ammaanku. Mar kale isku day.

checklist.sdkTag: Qoraalka Widget-ka ayaa lagu daray boggaaga
checklist.sdkReachable: Qoraalka Widget-ka waa la gaari karaa
checklist.widgetVisible: Widget-ka ayaa soo muuqday oo waa la arki karaa
checklist.singleInstance: Hal widget oo keliya oo ku yaal bogga

OK.title: Widget-kaaga waa nool yahay
OK.why: Waxaanu soo rarnay boggaaga waxaanu aragnay widget-ka lahaanshaha iyo inuu soo muuqday oo la arki karo.
OK.fix: Ma jirto wax la sameeyo — waad hagaagtay.

DOMAIN_NOT_ALLOWED.title: Domain aan la oggolayn / furaha oo aan la oggolayn
DOMAIN_NOT_ALLOWED.why: Qoraalka Widget-ka ayaa la soo rarray laakiin waxa uu sheegay in domain-kan aanu u oggolayn Furahaaga Widget-ka. Fariinta la mid ah waxa ay ku jirtaa furaha khaldan iyo domain-ka aan weli lagu darin.
DOMAIN_NOT_ALLOWED.fix: U fur Dashboard-ka EaseAccess24, xaqiiji in domain-kan saxda ah lagu daray ururkaaga, hubi in Furaha Widget-ka uu ku habboon yahay, ka dibna mar kale samee baaritaanka.

SDK_UNREACHABLE.title: Qoraalka Widget-ka lama gaari karo
SDK_UNREACHABLE.why: Birawser-kaaga ma gaari karin URL-ka qoraalka widget-ka. Tani badanaa waa arrin shabakad, CDN, ama kaydinta meesha ay ka tahay dhibaato qaabeyn.
SDK_UNREACHABLE.fix: Hubi shabakada/CDN-kaaga, nadiifi kaydinta, oo mar kale samee baaritaanka.

WIDGET_NOT_INITIALIZED.title: Widget-ka ma uusan soo shaqeynin
WIDGET_NOT_INITIALIZED.why: Qoraalka widget-ka waa meesha yaal, laakiin ma muuqan wax widget ah oo muuqda mana jirin sabab gaar ah oo la soo sheegay. Sababaha caadiga ah: domain-ka weli lama darin, furaha waa khaldan yahay, ama qoraal ayaa la xannibay.
WIDGET_NOT_INITIALIZED.fix: Xaqiiji domain-kan iyo Furaha Widget-ka ee Dashboard-kaaga EaseAccess24, hubi inaysan waxba xannibin qoraalka, ka dibna mar kale samee baaritaanka.

DUPLICATE_WIDGET.title: Widget laba-laab ah ayaa la helay
DUPLICATE_WIDGET.why: Wax ka badan hal widget ayaa ku soo baxay bogga. Tani waxay badanaa ka dhigan tahay in SDK-ga lagu daray laba jeer — tusaale ahaan, labadaba boostada tan iyo qoraal gacmeed oo ku jira mawduucaaga.
DUPLICATE_WIDGET.fix: Mid keliya isticmaal. Haddii aad qoraalka ku dartay mawduucaaga ama boosto kale, ka saar oo u oggolow boostada tan inay wax qabato. Marna ma saarno qoraalada adiga oo aan kuu sheegin.

POSSIBLE_DUPLICATE_WIDGET.title: Widget laba-laab ah oo suurtagal ah
POSSIBLE_DUPLICATE_WIDGET.why: Waxaan helnay calaamado muujinaya qoraal widget oo dheeraad ah (tusaale, calaamad qoraal oo dheeraad ah) laakiin ma xaqiijin karno widget labaad oo muuqda — kaydinta ayaa tan qarin karta.
POSSIBLE_DUPLICATE_WIDGET.fix: Hubi in widget-ka lagu daray hal mar oo keliya. Haddii aad qoraal gacmeed ku leedahay mawduucaaga, ka saar oo ku tiirsan boostada tan.

OPTIMIZER_INTERFERENCE.title: Boostada kaydinta ama hagaajinta ayaa laga yaabaa inay farageliso
OPTIMIZER_INTERFERENCE.why: Furaha Widget-ka waa la keydiyay, laakiin qoraalka widget-ka ma uusan ku jirin bogga — boostada kaydinta/hagaajinta ayaa laga yaabaa inay saartay ama beddeshay.
OPTIMIZER_INTERFERENCE.fix: Ka saar qoraalka EaseAccess24 kaydinta/hagaajinta. Talooyin faahfaahsan, boosto kasta, ayaa iman doona qaybta Iskaashiga.

STAGING_DETECTED.title: Goobta tijaabada ah waa la helay
STAGING_DETECTED.why: Tani waxay u muuqataa goob tijaabo ama horumarin ah. Widget-ka waxa uu muuqdaa oo kaliya domain-yada lagu oggol yahay EaseAccess24, markaa ma muuqan karto halkan.
STAGING_DETECTED.fix: Tani waa wax la filayo goobta tijaabada ah. Ku dar domain-kan Dashboard-kaaga haddii aad rabto in widget-ka uu halkan ka muuqdo, ama tijaabi domain-kaaga nool.

LOCALHOST_DETECTED.title: Goobta deegaanka deegaanka waa la helay
LOCALHOST_DETECTED.why: Goobtan waxa ay ka socotaa localhost. Widget-ka waxa uu muuqdaa oo kaliya domain-yada lagu oggol yahay EaseAccess24, markaa ma muuqan doonto deegaan ahaan.
LOCALHOST_DETECTED.fix: Tani waa wax la filayo deegaan ahaan. Tijaabi domain-kaaga nool ee la oggol yahay si aad u aragto widget-ka.

KEY_INVALID.title: Furaha Widget-ka lama aqbalin
KEY_INVALID.fix: Hubi furaha ku jira Dashboard-kaaga EaseAccess24 oo mar kale keydi.

SUBSCRIPTION_EXPIRED.title: Macquulka waa dhacay
SUBSCRIPTION_EXPIRED.why: Macquulka Furaha Widget-ka ma sii aha mid firfircoon.
SUBSCRIPTION_EXPIRED.fix: Dib u cusboonaysii qorshahaaga Dashboard-ka EaseAccess24.

ORG_DISABLED.title: Ururka waa la damiyay
ORG_DISABLED.why: Ururka Furaha Widget-ka waa la damiyay.
ORG_DISABLED.fix: La xiriir taageerada EaseAccess24 ama hubi Dashboard-kaaga.

compatibility.title: Iskuduwidda kaydinta iyo hagaajinta
compatibility.intro: Plugins-ka kaydinta iyo hagaajinta waxay dib u dhigi karaan, isu keeni karaan, ama ka saari karaan scripts-ka — oo ay ku jiraan widget-ka EaseAccess24. Waxaan ku darnaa tilmaamo ka codsanaya inay ka tagaan script-keena, laakiin qaar ka mid ah qaababka ayaa weli u baahan yihiin ka reebid gacanta. Marna ma beddelno goobaha plugin-ka kale.
compatibility.noneTitle: Lama ogaan wax plugins ah oo kaydin ama hagaajin ah
compatibility.noneBody: Ma helin mid ka mid ah plugins-ka kaydinta/hagaajinta ee aanu naqaano. Haddii widget-ku weli soo bixin, ku dar baaritaanka caafimaadka tabka Connection.
compatibility.cloudflareCdnNote: Ogow: Cloudflare oo u shaqeynaya sida CDN (Rocket Loader, Auto Minify meel fog) lama ogaan karo kaaga. Haddii aad isticmaasho Cloudflare, fiiri goobahaas sidoo kale.
compatibility.modifiedTitle: Script-ka widget-ka waxaa laga yaabaa in la beddelayo
compatibility.modifiedBody: Plugin kaydin/hagaajin ah ayaa firfircoon oo baaritaankii caafimaadka ee ugu dambeeyay wuxuu ogaaday in script-ka widget-ka uusan ku jirin bogga. Codso ka reebista hoose oo mar kale ku dar baaritaanka.

wp-rocket.recommendation: Ku Jira WP Rocket → File Optimization, ka reeb “widget.easeaccess24.com/sdk.js” ka JavaScript minification, isku darka, iyo “Delay JavaScript execution”. WP Rocket sidoo kale wuxuu u hogaansamaa tilmaanta data-no-minify.

litespeed.recommendation: Ku Jira LiteSpeed Cache → Page Optimization → JS Settings, ku dar “widget.easeaccess24.com” JS Excludes (iyo Deferred/Delayed excludes haddii la furo).

autoptimize.recommendation: Ku Jira Autoptimize → JS, Images..., ku dar “easeaccess24” qaybta “Exclude scripts from Autoptimize”. Autoptimize sidoo kale wuxuu u hogaansamaa tilmaanta data-no-optimize.

perfmatters.recommendation: Ku Jira Perfmatters → Assets, ku dar “easeaccess24” ka reebista “Delay JavaScript” iyo doorarka script defer/minify.

asset-cleanup.recommendation: Ku Jira Asset CleanUp, hubi in script-ka EaseAccess24 uusan laga saarin bogaggaaga, oo ka reeb isaga doorarka JS minify/combine/defer.

cloudflare.recommendation: Ku Jira Cloudflare, ka reeb script-ka widget-ka Rocket Loader (taggeennu wuxuu horay u dejiyey data-cfasync="false") iyo Auto Minify/Mirage haddii la furo scripts-ka.

eventLog.title: Diiwaanka waxqabadka
eventLog.intro: Taariikh kooban oo baaritaanada caafimaadka iyo dhacdooyinka plugin-ka. Diiwaankan wuxuu ku jiraa boggaaga mana aha mid loo diro meelna si otomaatig ah.
eventLog.empty: Wali ma jiraan wax dhacdooyin ah oo la diiwaangeliyay. Ku dar baaritaanka caafimaadka tabka Connection si aad mid u diiwaangeliso.
eventLog.loadError: Waanu awoodi waynay inaanu soo dejino diiwaanka waxqabadka. Dib u cusbooneysii bogga oo isku day mar kale.

supportReport.title: Warbixinta taageerada
supportReport.intro: Soo saar warbixin aad la wadaagi karto taageerada EaseAccess24. Waxay ku jirtaa deegaankaaga, xaalada isku xirnaanta, plugins-ka kaydinta ee la ogaaday, iyo dhacdooyinka dhawaan dhacay. Furaha widget-kaaga waa la qarisay mana jiraan xog shakhsi ah.
supportReport.privacyNote: Waxba si otomaatig ah looma soo dirayo. Ma jiraan server lug ku leh — waxaad nuqul ka qaadaneysaa ama soo dejineysaa warbixinta hoose oo aad adiga naftaada la wadaageysaa.
supportReport.previewLabel: Horudhac warbixin (waxa saxda ah ee la nuqul ka qaadan ama soo dejin doono)
supportReport.copyFailed: Nuqul ma heli kartid birawsarkan. Isticmaal Download beddelkeeda.
supportReport.generateError: Kama aanaan awoodin inaan soo saarno warbixinta. Dib u rar bogga oo mar kale isku day.

faq.title: Caawin & FAQ
faq.intro: Calaamadaha su'aalaha caadiga ah ee ku saabsan isku xirka iyo cilad-raadinta 'widget-ka'.

findKey.a: Soo gal app.easeaccess24.com, fur qaybta Integrate, oo koobi ka samee furahaaga widget-ka (ama qaybta oo dhan ee qoraalka). Ku dheji tabka Connection — waxaanu qaadan doonaa furaha ka soo qoraalka adiga.

notShowing.a: Samee Hubinta Caafimaadka ee tabka Connection. Waxay kuu sheegaysaa in qoraalka la raaciyay, la gaari karo, iyo in widget-ka runtii la muujiyay. Sababaha ugu badan waa in domain-ka aan lagu darin dashboard-kaaga, furaha oo khaldan, ama plugin-ka kaydinta oo saaraya qoraalka.

cachePlugin.q: Waxaan isticmaalaa plugin kaydin ama hagaajin. Ma isku dhici doontaa?
cachePlugin.a: Waa dhici kartaa. Qoraalka qoraalkeena wuxuu weydiiyaa plugins-ka caadiga ah inay iska ilaaliyaan, laakiin qaar ka mid ah qaababka wali waxay u baahan yihiin ka-saaris gacanta ah. Hubi tabka Compatibility-ga talooyin ku saabsan plugin kasta. Marna ma beddelno goobaha plugin kale adiga.

stagingLocalhost.q: Ma widget-ka wuxuu ka shaqeeyaa staging ama localhost?
stagingLocalhost.a: Widget-ka kaliya wuxuu soo bandhigaa domain-yada la oggol yahay ee furahaaga widget-ka, markaa inta badan ma muuqan doono staging ama localhost. Tani waa wax la filayo mana aha qalad plugin ah — ku tijaabi domain-kaaga tooska ah, ee la oggol yahay.

dataPrivacy.q: Muxuu xogta plugin-kani kaydiyaa ama u diraa?
dataPrivacy.a: Plugin-ka wuxuu kaydiyaa furahaaga widget-ka iyo goobahaaga goobtaada, oo ay weheliyaan diiwaanka hawl-gelinta maxalliga ah ee gaaban. Ma sameeyo wicitaanno toos ah oo EaseAccess24 ah marka laga reebo ku darista qoraalka widget-ka iyo, inta lagu jiro Hubinta Caafimaadka, tijaabinta in qoraalkaasi la gaari karo. Warbixinnada taageerada waxaa kaliya lagaa wadaagaa adiga, si gacanta ah.

removeData.q: Sideen u saaraa dhammaan xogta plugin-ka?
removeData.a: Habayntaada waa la hayaa marka aad damiso si aad dib ugu shidi karto mar dambe. Si aad wax walba u saarto, firfircooni "Ka saar dhammaan xogta EaseAccess24" ka hor intaadan tirtirin plugin-ka, ka dibna ka tirtirka shaashadda Plugins.

settings.removeDataLabel: Ka saar dhammaan xogta EaseAccess24 marka plugin-ka la tirtiro
settings.removeDataHelp: Marka la firfircoonaado, tirtiridda plugin-ka waxay sidoo kale baabi'isaa furahaaga widget-ka, goobaha, iyo diiwaanka hawl-gelinta. U daa OFF si aad u ilaaliso habayntaada dib-u-dejinta mustaqbalka. Filaalkaaga mawduuca marnaba lama taabanayo.
settings.saveError: Kama aanaan awoodin inaan keydiyo goobahaaga. Hubi isku xirkaaga oo mar kale isku day.
settings.loadError: Kama aanaan awoodin inaanu la soo saaro goobahaaga. Dib u rar bogga oo mar kale isku day.

footer.tagline: Ka caawinta in goobtaadu noqoto mid la gaari karo.
